titleStmt.title: SII 24.143: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 143. (A.R. No. 364 of 1953-54.) KOṬṬĀRAM, WALL INSIDE THE RICE STORAGE ROOM.

summary.p: Beginning built in and damaged and intercepted by walls. Records a gift of buffaloes by a number of Kōṉs (members of the shepherd community) such as Śrīraṅga-kkōṉ, Sēṉāpati Śrī Kulaśēkara-kkōṉ, Aḻagiyamaṇavāla-kōṉ, etc., for supply of ghee towards some service introduced by Kāśyapaṉ ••••• Perumāḷ alias Akaḷaṅka Brahmārāyar, one of the Śrīpādam-tāṅgum nambimār. The inscription is dated in the reign of Tribhuvanachakravarti Kulōttuṅga-chōḷa who was pleased to conquer Madurai, Īḻam, Karuvūr and the crowned head of the Pāṇḍya (i.e. Kulōttuṅga III). The regnal year quoted in the record is damaged, only the digit 1 in the unit's place being visible. It may be assigned either to the 21st or the 31st year of reign as the wording of the record indicates.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
⎯⎯ravattikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamum karuvūrum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭitta ṇṭaruḷiya śrī kulottuṅkacoḻadevarkku Iyā ttoṉṟāvatu kaṟkaṭaka nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu
⎯⎯ttārkum Ittiruppatiyil kāṇiyuṭaiya tiruvāyppāṭi nāṭ ruppatiyil śrīpātantāṅkum nampimāril kāśyapaṉ perumāḷāṉa Akaḷaṅka pirammārāyar ceyvitta A�
⎯⎯māka ney Aḷakka Ivar taṉta Uruvāy ṉāṅkaḷ kaik koṇṭa ciraṅkakkoṉ Erumai Iḷanāku perumāḷ peri kaṉ Erumai muṉṟum ceṉāpati cikulacekarakkoṉ
⎯⎯ḷakkoṉ Erumai Iraṇṭum ceyaṉ ciraṅkakoṉ Eru ma Āṭu patiṉoṉṟum Ammai Āḻvāṉ Aḻakiya maṇa Erumai Iraṇṭum maṇṭakam tirumāḷikai koṉ Erumai
⎯⎯vaṇṭuvarāpatikoṉ Erumai muṉṟum Āṭṭup ppaṉ Ulaka muṇṭakoṉ Eru ceṉāpati tiruva Erumai Iraṇ ṭum perumāḷ veta nāyakak koṉ Erumai I
⎯⎯�ṉ Amutavalavakkoṉ Erumai Iraṇṭum Eḻuvaṉ karuṇākara (kara) ko Āṭu pattum perumāḷ Irācameṉtirakkoṉ Erumai mu
⎯⎯rāyaṉ Aṇiyaraṅkakoṉ Erumai Iraṇṭum poṉnaṉ paḷḷiko ma Uḻuṉtaṉa tiruvāymoḻikoṉ Erumai muṉṟu tiruvāypāṭikkoṉ Erumai Iraṇṭum Arayaṉ co ṇa
⎯⎯mmāṉ śrī kopālak koṉ rupattaiñcum ciṟāṉ tūravira Āṭu patiṉoṉṟum cāntaṉ nāraciṅkakkoṉ Erumai māḷi keruṭakkoṉ Erumai muṉṟum periyāṉ periya O
⎯⎯iṉta Itter Aḻakiyakoṉ Āṭu patiṉ muṉṟum niṟaṉa koṉ Erumai Oṉṟum perumāḷ Eṭutta kai Oṉṟum Āka Erumai E mai
⎯⎯nāḻiyāl nāḻi Uriyāka vaṉta ṉeyyum Āṭu Oṉpatukkum ta neyyum Āṇṭu toṟum ci paṇṭāratte Aḷaṉtu vomāka ppi cantirātittavarai ṉān
Digital edition of SII 24.143 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
